name: solon
description: Solon Product — solo founder's AI-native sprint flow system (SFS). Provides slash command discovery for Claude Code via the `solon` plugin. Companion `gemini-extension.json` (Gemini CLI) and Codex CLI skill (~/.codex/skills/sfs/) share the same `sfs` CLI surface.

plugins.name: solon
plugins.description: Solon SFS slash command for Claude Code — routes `/sfs <command>` to the globally installed `sfs` binary (Homebrew/Scoop), falling back to project-vendored `bash .sfs-local/scripts/sfs-dispatch.sh` when needed.
